name: imagen-design-hub
description: MiriCanvas and DesignHub asset workflows for PNG elements, JPG backgrounds, SVG/GIF beta routes, image-gen source creation, and PNG fringe QA.

interface.shortDescription: Prepare DesignHub PNG, JPG, SVG, GIF, and CSV assets.
interface.longDescription: Route MiriCanvas DesignHub work into focused flows for PNG elements, JPG backgrounds, SVG beta elements, GIF beta elements, and post-upload CSV metadata. The plugin defaults generation work to the installed $image-gen skill, reuses the copied chroma-key helper for PNG elements instead of the built-in imagegen removal helper, adds magenta-fringe decontamination QA when a magenta key is safe, and requires Computer Use for live DesignHub upload/download CSV UI actions.
defaultPrompt: Use $image-gen to prepare PNG elements for DesignHub.
Run png-element chroma cleanup and fringe QA.
Use Computer Use for DesignHub CSV upload.
